summary: Tested Permission Management System (Yetki Yönetimi). All features working: Backend GET/PUT /api/permissions endpoints pass, admin can update permissions, non-admin gets 403 on update. Frontend PermissionsPage shows all 21 permission toggles across 5 groups (Araçlar, Müşteriler, Finansal İşlemler, Raporlar, Randevular). Sidebar filtering works correctly - satis user only sees permitted menu items.

issues: Console hydration warnings about <span> inside <th>/<tr>/<td>/<tbody> - cosmetic React warning, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/permissions returns default permissions with muhasebe and satis roles - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/permissions works for admin user - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/permissions returns 403 for non-admin (satis) user - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/permissions works for non-admin users - PASSED
Backend: All 21 permission keys exist for both roles - PASSED
Frontend: Permissions page loads at /permissions route for admin - PASSED
Frontend: Save button (save-permissions-btn) found and works - PASSED
Frontend: Toggle buttons work (perm-{role}-{key} format) - PASSED
Frontend: Permission groups displayed (Araçlar, Müşteriler, Finansal İşlemler, Raporlar, Randevular) - PASSED
Frontend: Save operation shows 'Kaydedildi' confirmation - PASSED
Frontend: Sidebar hides 'Yetki Yönetimi' for satis user (admin-only) - PASSED
Frontend: Sidebar hides 'Kullanıcılar' for satis user (admin-only) - PASSED
Frontend: Sidebar hides 'Raporlar' for satis user (reports_view: false) - PASSED
Frontend: Sidebar hides 'Gelir & Gider' for satis user (transactions_view: false) - PASSED
Frontend: Sidebar hides 'Çöp Kutusu' for satis user (trash_view: false) - PASSED
Frontend: Sidebar shows vehicles, customers, appointments for satis user - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: server.py (lines 414-444): DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS correctly defines 21 permission keys for muhasebe and satis roles
server.py (lines 446-465): GET/PUT /api/permissions endpoints work correctly with org_id filtering
server.py (line 456-457): PUT permission check correctly validates role === 'admin' and returns 403 otherwise
PermissionsPage.jsx: Toggle buttons have correct data-testid format 'perm-{role}-{key}'
AppContext.jsx (lines 337-342): hasPermission() helper correctly returns true for admin, checks permissions[role][key] for others
Sidebar.jsx (lines 40-45): Menu items correctly filtered by hasPermission() call
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test_satis_bbb7ff72@test.com user for testing non-admin permissions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Permission management system fully working. Admin can access /permissions page via 'Yetki Yönetimi' sidebar menu (data-testid='nav-permissions'). Toggle buttons use format data-testid='perm-{role}-{key}' e.g. 'perm-satis-vehicles_view'. Save button shows 'Kaydedildi' on success. Non-admin users (satis, muhasebe) have filtered sidebars based on their permissions. Default satis permissions: vehicles CRUD except delete, customers CRUD except delete, appointments full access, no transactions_view, no reports_view, no trash_view.

mocked_apis.Email verification: MOCKED - verification code displayed on screen

features_verified.GET /api/permissions: WORKING - returns org permissions with muhasebe/satis roles
features_verified.PUT /api/permissions (admin): WORKING - admin can update and save permissions
features_verified.PermissionsPage UI: WORKING - table with 5 groups, 21 permissions, 2 role columns
features_verified.Toggle buttons: WORKING - correctly toggle on/off with visual feedback
features_verified.Sidebar filtering: WORKING - non-admin users see filtered menu based on permissions
